queries.title: Failed Transactions
queries.description: Checks for all failed transactions in the masterstaging table for the following poster types: InventoryAdjustment, OrderAcknowledgement, InventoryStatus, TrailerStatus, OrderDetailChange, ShipLoad, PorkHotCarcass.

sql_blocks.label: Detect Failed Transactions
sql_blocks.sql:
select count(StagingId) as Count, PosterType
    from MasterStaging WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
    where TransferStatus = -3
        and postertype in ('InventoryAdjustment',
            'OrderAcknowledgement',
            'InventoryStatus',
            'TrailerStatus',
            'OrderDetailChange',
            'ShipLoad',
            'PorkHotCarcass')
        and FailReason <> ''
    group by PosterType
